sections.name: C2 Frameworks
sections.description: Command and Control frameworks for red team operations

items.name: Cobalt Strike
items.description: Industry-standard adversary simulation and red team ops platform. Beacon payload for covert C2 communications.
items.setup: Commercial license required. Team server runs on Linux, client on any OS.

items.name: Empire (PowerShell Empire)
items.description: Post-exploitation agent framework supporting PowerShell, Python, and C# agents.
items.setup:
git clone https://github.com/BC-SECURITY/Empire
cd Empire
./setup/install.sh
./ps-empire server
./ps-empire client

items.name: Covenant
items.description: .NET C2 framework with Grunt agents and a web-based interface.
items.setup:
git clone https://github.com/cobbr/Covenant
cd Covenant/Covenant
dotnet run

items.name: Sliver
items.description: Modern cross-platform C2 framework by BishopFox with implant generation.

items.name: Mythic
items.description: Collaborative, multi-platform C2 framework with customizable agents.
items.setup:
git clone https://github.com/its-a-feature/Mythic
cd Mythic
./mythic-cli install
./mythic-cli start

items.name: Havoc
items.description: Modern C2 framework with Demon agent, custom shellcode, and sleep masking.
items.setup:
git clone https://github.com/HavocFramework/Havoc
cd Havoc
make
./havoc server --profile profiles/havoc.yaotl

sections.name: Living off the Land

items.description: Background file transfer and download

items.description: Powerful scripting engine for download/execute and post-exploitation

items.description: Windows Script Host for VBS/JS execution

items.description: .NET installer utility for executing assemblies
